name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: It's a sad day for our country. It's a sad day for our Constitution.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d364526d7c&e=1050d051da)
---
| | | **Impeachment should never be a weapon for political games**
---
| Today, House Democrats have turned the word impeachment into just another partisan tool aimed at helping them gain power over the American people. Impeachment of the President of the United States should never be used for partisan political gain. Even before he was sworn into office Democrats announced this day would come. Nearly three wasted years later and after untold failed investigations Democrats have given up and decided this excuse for impeachment is good enough. It is a sad day for America and a sad day for the U.S. Constitution.
---
| | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f513bef1c1&e=1050d051da)
---
But here's the [good news](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=646ecdb6bd&e=1050d051da). The Democrats are getting beat at their own game as President Trump's approval ratings went up today, Democrats went down. Why? Because Americans are standing with their President. He is the man we chose to lead our country, and that's exactly what he's been doing.
---
| With true supporters by his side, our President will continue to lead our country into more growth and prosperity. I am committed to standing with President Trump as a member of Congress in 2020 and need your help to get there. [Would you consider a donation to my campaign for U.S. Congress?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ea1b07ac8a&e=1050d051da)

We've seen what happens when the Democrats have a majority in the House. We can not afford to lose a single seat, which is exactly why I am running. Thank you for helping me get to Washington to give President Trump another trusted conservative fighter at his side!

Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner

---
| [SHOW YOUR SUPPORT TODAY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f3a8984920&e=1050d051da "SHOW YOUR SUPPORT TODAY")

A South Carolina Senate poll was released earlier this week, and experts say that Republican Lindsey Graham "looks extremely vulnerable against Democratic contender Jaime Harrison." Check it out:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc36a/2a380d31/22ee38c2/f0e109/880415212/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTIxOF9NV0g0SGFycmlzb240XzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20191218_MWH4Harrison4_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")
Winning in South Carolina will be tough, but Jaime is well within striking distance. Now he's relying on your help to close that two point gap.
[**We came up just a little short of our $10,000 goal for Jaime yesterday, so we 're trying to make up ground tonight. Will you please give $3 or more right now to swing the polls in Democats' favor, unseat Lindsey Graham, and win back the Senate majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc36a/2a380d31/22ee38c2/f0e109/880415212/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTIxOF9NV0g0SGFycmlzb240XzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20191218_MWH4Harrison4_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

Jaime grew up poor and was raised by a single Mom. He's the first person in his family to graduate from college, and he went on to become the first African American chair of the South Carolina Democratic Party.
Jaime can defeat Graham, but not without you, everyone. [**Will you please donate whatever you can right now?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc36a/2a380d31/22ee38c2/f0e109/880415212/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0amgiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTIxOF9NV0g0SGFycmlzb240XzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jh?refcode=e20191218_MWH4Harrison4_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

Team Maggie

body:
Sunrise Movement Austin endorses Heidi, and Austin AFSCME recommends Heidi Sloan for the Central Labor Council endorsement | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/694d45c35e7e/we-are-behind-by-76-donations-3821177?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | |
---
| | | , We’ve got big news. **Heidi is union recommended!** This past weekend, AFSCME Local 1624 voted overwhelmingly to recommend Heidi Sloan for the Central Labor Council endorsement. This is a big deal!
---
|
---
| [ DONATE ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=eb631ebdb6&e=c169cb0a8e " DONATE ")
---
| We are honored to receive the support of our brothers and sisters who work hard everyday to keep our local governments running. **We will always fight for union power and their right to organize.**

We’re gearing up for the last fundraising deadline before the primary -- **Can you donate today to the nation’s strongest labor candidate?**
---
| [Express Donate: $10](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=1ca3e5da5a&e=c169cb0a8e "Express Donate: $10")

---
| We’re also thrilled to have the endorsement of our local Sunrise Movement Austin. It’s activists and organizers building grassroots movements who will save our planet.
---
|
---
| A couple weeks ago, Heidi joined Sunrise Movement Austin’s action to demand Austin Energy fight harder and faster to get us to 100% renewable energy. We’re ready to stand shoulder to shoulder with the Sunrise Movement to win a Green New Deal for all of us.

Here’s the problem: **We can’t win a Green New Deal without some green!** [Donate today for a greener tomorrow.](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=d46e38649d&e=c169cb0a8e)

Team Heidi

In solidarity, Team Heidi | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | " DONATE " | | PAID FOR BY HEIDI SLOAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Cory Booker
subject: The first (and with your help, only) debate stage that I will not be on.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I'll be making my case directly to the people instead. Team, Tomorrow evening, the sixth DNC Democratic debate will be held. I won't be there, which means it'll be the first debate of this campaign that I will not be participating in. But I'll be making my case directly to the people instead. I'm headed to Iowa for a five-day bus tour and during the debate tomorrow, I'll be calling caucus-goers to talk with them about our vision of justice for all. **[I'll also be calling some of our grassroots donors tomorrow night. If you donate today, you may be one of the supporters I talk to.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191218_CB_20191218-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The presidential debate stage is an important platform for candidates to share their ideas with a national audience. I won't have that opportunity this time around, but I'll be talking directly with caucus-goers and continuing to build this campaign brick by brick. Today, I was in Nevada -- another critical caucus state. The enthusiasm that we're seeing for our campaign on the ground both here and across the country inspires me every single day. The DNC's debate thresholds don't accurately capture the excitement for this movement that we're building together. **[It's why I'm asking you to chip in $5 to help power our campaign during these critical next few weeks. And hey, keep your phone close by. I may be giving you a call tomorrow night.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191218_CB_20191218-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I can't wait to be back in Iowa again tomorrow. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191218_CB_20191218-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---

---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ce3/5fca0d19/7878cdd8/291c9006/1839743310/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ce3/5fca0d19/7878cdd8/291c9005/1839743310/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ce3/5fca0d19/7878cdd8/291c9004/1839743310/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. | | | We'll get right to the point - Michael needs your support right now.

[We need to raise $700,000 or we won't be able to compete in New Hampshire:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8dc/134673f2/94824a3/699785f4/3366903170/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_121819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| |

# The Impeachment Farce has gone too far!

What has happened to our country?!

It is hard to imagine ever getting to this moment...**a legislative coup d'état to overturn the election!**

Yet that is EXACTLY what is happening. I am calling on _every proud, American patriot_ to join me and scream, "**NO! Not in my country!** " to the loathsome Democrat coup plotters and their media handmaidens.
[**Sign the petition to tell the Democrats to STOP!**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=3508f783a4&e=01c99b7fbd)

---
| **President Trump has kept his promise to make America great again**...and now he needs us to get his back!

The power-mad leftists in Congress, the media, and the deep state couldn't win at the ballot box so now they are trying to remove the best president since Reagan...just because he stands with us and not with the powerful and privileged 1%ers of Washington D.C.

**I say no!** [Sign the petition now.](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=687b0d84dc&e=01c99b7fbd) They can't stand against all of us and right now, we must stand together if we are to keep our Republic and save our President!

In liberty,
Kathaleen

**Just moments ago, Anthony Brindisi voted with Nancy Pelosi and the do-nothing Democrats to impeach President Trump!**

New York’s 22nd Congressional District elected President Trump in 2016 by over 15%, and now Anthony Brindisi has turned his back on the hard-working people of Upstate New York.

**We can’t tolerate Anthony Brindisi’s lies any longer.**

**We need to raise $5,000 before midnight TONIGHT to combat Anthony Brindisi and the do-nothing Democrats.**

Democrats have wasted time and taxpayer dollars with this impeachment process for months, and Anthony Brindisi has supported it every step of the way. Meanwhile, President Trump has been working tirelessly to secure our border, eliminate terrorist groups, and boost our economy.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Some thoughts on today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I took an oath to uphold the Constitution of the United States, and so did my colleagues in the Senate and in the House. And we owe it to the American people to do our jobs and get to the... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bc94/45c30650/110017f6a/66fbcc30/3137075126/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Today was an important day for our country and our democracy. The United States House of Representatives voted to impeach Donald Trump.

I took an oath to uphold the Constitution of the United States, and so did my colleagues in the Senate and in the House. And we owe it to the American people to do our jobs and get to the bottom of this.

Come the new year, I will be a juror in Donald Trump's Senate trial, and I'll uphold my oath. Because nobody is above the law -- not even the president of the United States.

But it's important to remember that Trump is just the worst symptom -- not the cause -- of a rigged, corrupt system. A system that rewards the rich and powerful and leaves working people behind.

2020 is our chance to change that. Our chance to take back the reins of our democracy and put political and economic power in the hands of working people. We're up against big problems, and we need big ideas to solve them. That's what we're fighting for.

And together, we'll win.

-- Elizabeth

body:
The Democrat impeachment is a betrayal of Oklahoma values. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=795c6d9796&u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e52766ff16)

| Peter,

Kendra Horn, AOC, and Nancy Pelosi just teamed up to throw out your vote for President Trump in 2016.

Horn aided and abetted the impeachment inquiry that has torn our country apart, showing her true colors.

When Horn ran for Congress last year, she claimed to be different. She claimed to be a "moderate" voice in a conservative district. But now it's clear that she wasn't being honest with you -- this impeachment vote proves that she's no different from the rest in Washington. She's simply a pawn for Nancy Pelosi, AOC and the far-left radicals... she is part of the partisan problem in DC.

Horn has decided to put the political interests of the National Democrat Party and Nancy Pelosi ahead of the interests of the hard-working voters of the 5th District of Oklahoma. She has proven herself to be a partisan servant of Washington, NOT our district.

History will show this impeachment to be a far-left fantasy that suckered an entire party and tore our country apart—Kendra Horn is part of that problem. The failed Mueller witch hunt and the Inspector General Report both confirmed that the left wants to overturn the 2016 election and will go to any lengths to do it.

Simply put, this was a time for courage to stand against a partisan witch hunt and Kendra Horn failed us. She has to go. clean_body: The Democrat impeachment is a betrayal of Oklahoma values. | | | | | | Peter, Kendra Horn, AOC, and Nancy Pelosi just teamed up to throw out your vote for President Trump in 2016. Horn aided and abetted the impeachment inquiry that has torn our country apart, showing her true colors. When Horn ran for Congress last year, she claimed to be different. She claimed to be a "moderate" voice in a conservative district. But now it's clear that she wasn't being honest with you -- this impeachment vote proves that she's no different from the rest in Washington. She's simply a pawn for Nancy Pelosi, AOC and the far-left radicals... she is part of the partisan problem in DC. Horn has decided to put the political interests of the National Democrat Party and Nancy Pelosi ahead of the interests of the hard-working voters of the 5th District of Oklahoma. She has proven herself to be a partisan servant of Washington, NOT our district. History will show this impeachment to be a far-left fantasy that suckered an entire party and tore our country apart—Kendra Horn is part of that problem. The failed Mueller witch hunt and the Inspector General Report both confirmed that the left wants to overturn the 2016 election and will go to any lengths to do it. Simply put, this was a time for courage to stand against a partisan witch hunt and Kendra Horn failed us. She has to go. | "Defeat Horn: Donate $5 >>" | "Defeat Horn: Donate $25 >>" | "Defeat Horn: Donate $50 >>" | "Defeat Horn: Donate $100 >>" | "Defeat Kendra Horn: Donate $Other >>" | In Congress I plan to serve YOU, not the far-left Hollywood and California liberals. When I say I'm going to do something -- I do it. I've proven that. I have experience fighting bureaucracy -- I've stood up and paid a political price for it. You know where I stand and what I'll do. We need every bit of help, however, so we can flip this district because the left will go to extreme ends to defend it. National Journal said this is the nation's Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House from Pelosi and AOC in 2020. body:
The Democrats deserve to lose. Help us do it. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=90fad69796&u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=10135a21ac)

| | [END THE MADNESS ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=31068b67a2&e=90fad69796 "END THE MADNESS ›")
---
| Peter, The Democrats in the House just voted to overturn the 2016 election.

Don't let anyone try to convince you that this wasn't their plan all along. The left has been clamoring for impeachment since before President Trump even took the oath of office.

Nancy Pelosi could have delivered for the American people this year, [**instead she has been a radical obstructionist**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=ad6950796e&e=90fad69796) and allowed the far-left Squad to take over the Democrat Caucus.

There is no difference between your average Democrat and AOC's Squad now, almost every single one of the over 200 Democrats in the House just voted to overturn the 2016 election. This is AOC's party now.

And while the Democrats pursued this witch-hunt, Iowa families suffered.

There was constant delay on passing USMCA.

There was no action to reduce the healthcare bureaucracy and cut costs.

There was no action on our unsustainable debt.

And most shamefully, there was no action on the unmitigated disaster at our southern border.

[**The Democrats do not deserve power**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=be649b1ff9&e=90fad69796) and we need your help to remove them from it. Districts like this one--conservative districts--are the key to flipping the House in 2020.

[**You can make all of the difference in the world by donating just $2, for IA-02, to help us power our campaign to end the madness.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=b3cb63dcc2&e=90fad69796)

I'm ready and willing to fight for Iowans. This district voted for President Trump in 2016 precisely because they knew he would fight for them. I will too.

[**Please donate just $2 to help us reach voters and tell them that every Democrat running against us is just going to be more of the same.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=24ff8de2cb&e=90fad69796) We need a conservative House in 2020 that will have the President's back. It's critically important.

Thank you for fighting with us, in 2020 we are going to put an end to the Democrats' madness and deliver for Iowa families.

For Iowa,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=eebf9e83b1&e=90fad69796)
Bobby Schilling

body:
Today, House Democrats did the unthinkable... After weeks of hearings that have failed to bring a single fact to light, they have abandoned due process Peter, Today, House Democrats did the unthinkable... After weeks of hearings that have failed to bring a single fact to light, they have abandoned due process and made it official:
**President Donald J. Trump is now just the third president in U.S. history to be impeached by the House of Representatives.**
Regardless of your own personal opinion on our president, what the Democrats just did tears at the fabric of our democracy.
Our constitution reserves impeachment for high crimes and misdemeanors... things that require facts to prove... not just a personal dislike.
We can’t stand by idly as Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff use impeachment as a weapon to undo the results of the 2016 election! I’m asking you to join me in rejecting the misguided impeachment process that Democrats are pursuing... something our current representative FAILED to do. clean_body: Today, House Democrats did the unthinkable... After weeks of hearings that have failed to bring a single fact to light, they have abandoned due process Peter, Today, House Democrats did the unthinkable... After weeks of hearings that have failed to bring a single fact to light, they have abandoned due process and made it official: President Donald J. Trump is now just the third president in U.S. history to be impeached by the House of Representatives. Regardless of your own personal opinion on our president, what the Democrats just did tears at the fabric of our democracy. Our constitution reserves impeachment for high crimes and misdemeanors... things that require facts to prove... not just a personal dislike. We can’t stand by idly as Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff use impeachment as a weapon to undo the results of the 2016 election! I’m asking you to join me in rejecting the misguided impeachment process that Democrats are pursuing... something our current representative FAILED to do. Peter, this is bigger than any one of us. This is even bigger than President Trump. This is about the future of our democracy, and the preservation of our Constitution. I need you to join me in sending a message to Nancy Pelosi and the radical Democrats in Congress: the American people DO NOT support this unjust impeachment: Lisa Scheller Candidate for Congress (PA-07) PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: A Statement From Rob Ortt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| **A STATEMENT FROM SENATOR ROB ORTT**
_A statement from Bronze Star recipient and New York State Senator Rob Ortt_
“Today’s vote by House Democrats to impeach President Trump marks the sad completion of a process over three years in the making. Since election night in 2016, Democrats have set out to overturn the will of the American people and remove our democratically elected president. The use of impeachment as a partisan campaign tool by Speaker Pelosi, Congressman Nadler, and Congressman Schiff is an embarrassment and should sit uneasily with any American. I fear for the precedent that this sham impeachment will have on American democracy going forward.

“Throughout this process, the residents of New York’s 27th Congressional District have been without a voice in Washington to call out this sham attack on our president. It is time for Gov. Cuomo to end the political games and to call a special election so our community can finally have someone in Congress fighting for our conservative values and President Trump's agenda.” ###
_After the terror attacks on September 11, 2001, Ortt enlisted in the U.S. Army and would serve as a First Lieutenant in Afghanistan during Operation Enduring Freedom. During his service, Ortt would be awarded the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghanistan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman’s Badge. Ortt was also deployed to the U.S. Southern border as part of the recently declassified 2006 Operation Jumpstart, which supported border security and construction of a border fence._

name: Wendy Davis
subject: Spineless is not the Texas way
body:
My opponent, Chip Roy, voted against impeaching Donald Trump.
Friend,
**Today my opponent, Chip Roy, voted against impeaching Donald Trump.**
Moments like this tell you a lot about a person's values - and here's what I make of Chip's: I see someone who's looking the other way to protect Donald Trump, even when our democracy is at stake. I see someone putting party over country, even though the dire circumstances we're in require the exact opposite.
**I see someone who 's spineless. And let me tell you: Spineless isn't how we do things in Texas.**
Chip Roy shouldn't get a free pass on such a shameless vote, and that's why I'm asking you to join me in raising your voice today. Will you add your name to my petition and condemn Chip Roy's vote against impeachment? I'm hoping for 5,000 supporters to sign before midnight tonight.
**[Add your name: Condemn Chip Roy for putting the Republican Party before the American people.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk39-su-nd")**
Let me tell you a little about what I value, friend: I value speaking up for what's right - even when it means standing up to the powerful. Back when I was first sworn into the Fort Worth City Council, I made a promise to myself - that I would always vote my conscience, no matter the consequences, and that I would always choose what was right for the people I represented.
Folks need somebody in Congress who's going to fight for them. That's why I'm running, and with your help, we'll flip this seat blue and send Chip packing.
**[Until then, I'm asking you to add your name now to condemn Chip Roy for putting the Republican Party before the American people.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk39-su-nd")**
Thank you for speaking up at this critical moment for our country.
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ab3/704929dc/16797a90/3993e1a9/1322244832/VEsF/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ab3/704929dc/16797a90/3993e1a8/1322244832/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ab3/704929dc/16797a90/3993e1ab/1322244832/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")

Peter,

House Democrats just cast their votes to impeach President Trump in one of the most partisan, politically-motivated moves in the history of our great nation.

Since the outcome of election night in 2016, the Left has been unhinged, making it their mission to obstruct President Trump and derail the conservative agenda. But the behavior exhibited throughout this sham of an impeachment proceeding is not only appalling and disgraceful, but it is also a _downright embarrassment to our country and the experiment in constitutional republicanism that our founding fathers envisioned_.

**All eyes will be on the Senate, where the articles of impeachment will be presented in a trial.**

It has never been more critical that you, as a member of the best grassroots team in the nation, stand with President Trump and unite to strengthen our conservative Senate Majority.

Last year, you stepped up to defend the Senate. This year, it's all on the line. President Trump needs you now, more than ever.
[**Show our president you stand with him and are committed to protecting our values and agenda --make a contribution before MIDNIGHT ON FRIDAY and get 3X MATCHED**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEzNzM2MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTc1MDU4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: We cannot let the Senate trial be part of the cover-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c43c/6cd27893/52b695d6/1587abbd/1389483307/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | The House has voted to impeach the President. Now, it is the Senate's solemn duty to conduct a full and fair trial to determine whether the President should be removed from office. When the impeachment trial begins, every Senator will take this oath: _"I solemnly swear that in all things appertaining to the trial of the impeachment of [President Donald Trump], now pending, I will do impartial justice according to the Constitution and laws. So help me God."_ But Senator McConnell has already made his intentions plain: This will be a show trial, designed to quickly dismiss the serious charges against the President. He has rejected Senator Schumer's request to call critical witnesses with first-hand knowledge, including the acting White House chief of staff and the President's national security advisor at the time. Senator McConnell actually complained that calling these witnesses is a pathway "to get to guilty". Isn't that awfully telling? The Republicans are effectively telling us that party comes over country, that fealty to the President is above fealty to the Constitution. I can't promise you today how this is going to go. But know this: I'm going to keep fighting with everything I've got to stand up for the truth and for a full discussion before the American people. This moment demands our loyalty to the Constitution above party, to our country above party, and a complete determination to get the full facts and fair proceedings for all involved. _Jeff_ [Discuss on Facebook](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c43c/6cd27893/52b695d6/1587abba/1389483307/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.facebook.com/JeffMerkleyOregon/posts/3177748228910913") |

This email was sent by **[Jeff Merkley for Oregon](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c43c/6cd27893/52b695d6/1587abb8/1389483307/VEsC/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")**

name: Tom Steyer
subject: For the third time in history:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend, today the House voted to impeach the most corrupt president we’ve ever had. But truth be told, I’m not thinking about Donald Trump right now. Instead, I’m thinking about this movement — and what we accomplished by speaking up together. Your voice steered a national conversation about impeachment when we needed it most. **You made history today, and I hope you don’t take that lightly.** If the Senate ignores the mountain of evidence against this president, they have to go on the record, with the entire nation watching. History books will not be kind to spineless leaders who don’t stand up for what’s right. Thank you for building this movement with me. I’m grateful for the chance to fight with you — and I’ll keep fighting for you as president. With you,
---
---
Tom Steyer
---

clean_body: | | | | Friend, today the House voted to impeach the most corrupt president we’ve ever had. But truth be told, I’m not thinking about Donald Trump right now. Instead, I’m thinking about this movement — and what we accomplished by speaking up together. Your voice steered a national conversation about impeachment when we needed it most. You made history today, and I hope you don’t take that lightly. If the Senate ignores the mountain of evidence against this president, they have to go on the record, with the entire nation watching. History books will not be kind to spineless leaders who don’t stand up for what’s right. Thank you for building this movement with me. I’m grateful for the chance to fight with you — and I’ll keep fighting for you as president. With you, Tom Steyer Thanks for your support, friend. We’re still looking for more volunteers from Pennsylvania. **BREAKING:** **House votes to impeach Trump!**
Team, Republicans continue to defend Donald Trump's every action, no matter how hateful or disgraceful. They're doing everything in their power to confuse and deceive the American people to keep the president in office.

**The Washington Post reports that Trump just became the third president in our nation 's history to be impeached. But not a single Republican voted for impeachment - despite the evidence of abuse of power! ** ****
With so much false information out there, we wanted to reach out directly to Democrats like you, Team, to get your opinion on impeachment. Please, tell us what you think of Trump's conduct:

name: Yang2020
subject: A tricky thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4927%2E377263%2EegbPCr) Yang Gang --

Momentum is a tricky thing. Some campaigns have momentum and then lose it. Some never have it. But our campaign is the only one that has been building and growing consistently since we launched...until now.

We set a public goal of $2 million by the time Andrew ended his bus tour in Iowa. After that goal, we thought the momentum would continue. But right now, we are coming up short of where we thought we would be tonight before tomorrow's debate.

**[If we slow down, we will lose all our momentum. Can you chip in $10 or more and help us close the gap?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20101?t=5&akid=4927%2E377263%2EegbPCr)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20101?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4927%2E377263%2EegbPCr)

Underdog campaigns don’t have the luxury of losing momentum. We have to keep building and growing every single day. **[Can you make sure we don’t fall even a step behind and pitch in?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20101?t=12&akid=4927%2E377263%2EegbPCr)**

Let’s keep the momentum,

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20101?t=13&akid=4927%2E377263%2EegbPCr)

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: This is not the end of the impeachment process. It's the beginning. And the road through the Senate will be long and tough. We'll need you fighting hard in the weeks to come.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363909de/55b66746/2d1fa24e/80f7796/929717241/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | I just joined my colleagues in the House to vote to impeach the President. It was a vote for justice and accountability. For democracy. But it was not a vote to celebrate. I keep thinking what it cost our country to get to this moment - the damage done by a President who does not believe our laws apply to him. This is not the end of the impeachment process. It's the beginning. And the road through the Senate will be long and tough. We'll need you fighting hard in the weeks to come. With hope for better days ahead, [DONATE](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363909de/55b66746/2d1fa24e/80f7797/929717241/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-18-impeachment&recurring=1&amount=3") |

clean_body: | "" | | I just joined my colleagues in the House to vote to impeach the President. It was a vote for justice and accountability. For democracy. But it was not a vote to celebrate. I keep thinking what it cost our country to get to this moment - the damage done by a President who does not believe our laws apply to him. This is not the end of the impeachment process. It's the beginning. And the road through the Senate will be long and tough. We'll need you fighting hard in the weeks to come. With hope for better days ahead, "" | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137. name: Steve Chabot
subject: Impeachment - Here We Go
body:
Impeachment: Here We Go No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Impeachment - Here We Go](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-j/)
Today's the day. Democrats in the House are actually going to go through with it. They are going to impeach President Trump - on the flimsiest of grounds! In this week's blog, I give you my thoughts on how this all plays out. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Impeaching the President - They're Really Going to Do It](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-d/)
Democrats in Congress have been calling for President Trump's impeachment since the day he was inaugurated. In the next few days, the Democrat-led House will presumably vote for impeachment. In this week's blog, I discuss the upcoming impeachment vote in the House, how the Senate will likely vote, and how this whole process is doing irreparable harm to our nation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [The Impeachment Sham is now Back in the Judiciary Committee](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-u/)
Today the impeachment circus returns to the Judiciary Committee, on which I've served for more than two decades. In this week's blog, I discuss the latest act in the democrats' impeachment circus and how I will use my time in the committee to expose how this inquiry is dividing our country and wasting millions in taxpayer dollars. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [So, Any Chance Michael Bloomberg's Going to be Our Next President?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-n/)
Michael Bloomberg is a very successful businessman, and later served three consecutive terms as Mayor of New York City. Most would argue that he had a pretty successful run at both, although he has now refuted, and apologized for, some of his signature policies, like stop and frisk. Now he wants to be our president. This week I write about Bloomberg's chances of winning and how he will spend a fortune trying. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jduuujo-kujkulhluu-f/)

| Friend, **I just came from the House floor where I voted NO to impeaching our President Donald J. Trump.** **The evidence clearly does not support the articles of impeachment concocted by House Democrats.** But that hasn't stopped them from tearing apart our country and wasting time on this partisan witch hunt. No, they'd rather score cheap political points than find common ground and work together to solve problems. From the start of Donald Trump's presidency, Democrats have been clear that impeachment is a just a tool to destroy President Trump and his America First agenda. **This sham impeachment is a disgrace to the Constitution and the American people.** With our economy hitting record highs, the Democrats won't stop with this political smokescreen. Outside groups are pouring millions of dollars into North Carolina to distract voters from the positive economy President Trump and our pro-growth policies have achieved. It's critical that our report shows our campaign is picking up speed, not losing it -- especially in the face of a crowded Republican primary. Unfortunately, our current numbers show we 're behind our critical fundraising goals: This is a critical moment for our race. We need to raise $37,038 by the end of this week in order to get back on track. name: Mary Mancini
subject: it's time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Donald Trump will be remembered as a villain in the history books. The corruption of the GOP will destroy the Republican Party as we know it. We’re at a moment right now, where we get to make a choice. We get to decide the future of this country and what we will tolerate from those in power.
November will bring the most divisive election of our time. GOP leadership will have to face the music as Americans stand up and say ‘We demand more.’ This is no longer about ideological differences, or conservative vs. liberal. This is about a political system hijacked by criminals and crooks. This is about protecting our liberties and freedoms. This is about saving our democracy.
The South has too long been suffocated by a shroud of Republican Red. It is time for Tennesseans to come together. It is time for Tennessee to go BLUE!
Help us, please, by making a donation right now. We can do this, but only if we are ALL in this together.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/GJw4NZFDOUaWw74BKdbsOA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GJw4NZFDOUaWw74BKdbsOA2]
Thank you,

--

Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Dean Browning
subject: Fellow Patriot,are you ready for Christmas?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving and you are gearing up for a very Merry Christmas. I wanted to take a moment to reach out to you during the Holiday season and talk about the upcoming election in 2020.
Campaigns are not easy. Nor is being a publicly elected official; whether it is local city council or the United States Congress, it takes a lot of hard work and courage to be a public servant.
I want you to know that when I was a Lehigh County Commissioner, I worked overtime to ensure we had a vibrant economy where anyone who was willing to work hard could succeed.
I want to take that work effort and bring it to the U.S. Congress.
I want Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District to be the best place in American to live and raise a family.
I also want the United States to remain a beacon of hope and prosperity to those abroad.
Being a public servant is one of the gratifying and rewarding job this country can offer. Unfortunately, campaigning is the most difficult aspect of becoming a public servant. I am sure you know that the upcoming Congressional race is going to be extremely competitive. I already have two Republican challengers for the primary plus incumbent Representative Susan Wild in the general.
[Please help me in this effort. A contribution of $25, or even $10, will go miles in helping my campaign be victorious in November 2020. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kvrd5gJ8QAes5ubtMOzHc3RRaGD6u7noIHYeBoOkHDqgZ_fJ8xr7ecKEFB-fjlugzfIKvgIzo0opAsL1gu798RTmYx-nrTtwnS_ZYfr1ybnpdyHzZoLPDhXQ_6Z5k3rYnmkmyz_uC_1Z5uvJkwcbKNO8YTCWGToyZfsvTowUtCflOhNqvJ-g1Q==&c=4nZVc-LDxn-GFFRDVuX_pmymYCZusz_ZX80-UJfFHOicwlSqGGikwg==&ch=Si7IDCjvBBiqAtz-nrhgc4uRGTGTTyRJ4XIjvW16UnkPut67aafbRg==)
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kvrd5gJ8QAes5ubtMOzHc3RRaGD6u7noIHYeBoOkHDqgZ_fJ8xr7ecKEFB-fjlugzfIKvgIzo0opAsL1gu798RTmYx-nrTtwnS_ZYfr1ybnpdyHzZoLPDhXQ_6Z5k3rYnmkmyz_uC_1Z5uvJkwcbKNO8YTCWGToyZfsvTowUtCflOhNqvJ-g1Q==&c=4nZVc-LDxn-GFFRDVuX_pmymYCZusz_ZX80-UJfFHOicwlSqGGikwg==&ch=Si7IDCjvBBiqAtz-nrhgc4uRGTGTTyRJ4XIjvW16UnkPut67aafbRg==)
---
| The job of campaigning is not easy and, unlike Susan Wild, I rely on the support and contributions of grassroots donors like yourself. While Rep. Wild may receive thousands in donations from outside the Lehigh Valley, my campaign is run off small dollar, local donations averaging less than $100.
That is why I need you to chip in now so I can win in November and bring Conservative values back to our district. Values that work for every home and every family, not just the Elite and Special Interests.
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kvrd5gJ8QAes5ubtMOzHc3RRaGD6u7noIHYeBoOkHDqgZ_fJ8xr7ecKEFB-fjlugzfIKvgIzo0opAsL1gu798RTmYx-nrTtwnS_ZYfr1ybnpdyHzZoLPDhXQ_6Z5k3rYnmkmyz_uC_1Z5uvJkwcbKNO8YTCWGToyZfsvTowUtCflOhNqvJ-g1Q==&c=4nZVc-LDxn-GFFRDVuX_pmymYCZusz_ZX80-UJfFHOicwlSqGGikwg==&ch=Si7IDCjvBBiqAtz-nrhgc4uRGTGTTyRJ4XIjvW16UnkPut67aafbRg==)
---
| Again, Fellow Patriot, thank you for taking the time to read this email. With supporters like yourself, we can, and we will win.
---
| For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S - Have you seen Rep. Susan Wild's support for this bogus impeachment? We need to vote her out in November!
[Please consider donating just $25 to help support my campaign](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kvrd5gJ8QAes5ubtMOzHc3RRaGD6u7noIHYeBoOkHDqgZ_fJ8xr7ecKEFB-fjlugzfIKvgIzo0opAsL1gu798RTmYx-nrTtwnS_ZYfr1ybnpdyHzZoLPDhXQ_6Z5k3rYnmkmyz_uC_1Z5uvJkwcbKNO8YTCWGToyZfsvTowUtCflOhNqvJ-g1Q==&c=4nZVc-LDxn-GFFRDVuX_pmymYCZusz_ZX80-UJfFHOicwlSqGGikwg==&ch=Si7IDCjvBBiqAtz-nrhgc4uRGTGTTyRJ4XIjvW16UnkPut67aafbRg==)
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kvrd5gJ8QAes5ubtMOzHc3RRaGD6u7noIHYeBoOkHDqgZ_fJ8xr7ecKEFB-fjlugzfIKvgIzo0opAsL1gu798RTmYx-nrTtwnS_ZYfr1ybnpdyHzZoLPDhXQ_6Z5k3rYnmkmyz_uC_1Z5uvJkwcbKNO8YTCWGToyZfsvTowUtCflOhNqvJ-g1Q==&c=4nZVc-LDxn-GFFRDVuX_pmymYCZusz_ZX80-UJfFHOicwlSqGGikwg==&ch=Si7IDCjvBBiqAtz-nrhgc4uRGTGTTyRJ4XIjvW16UnkPut67aafbRg==)

I already have two Republican challengers for the primary plus incumbent Representative Susan Wild in the general. == | | | == | The job of campaigning is not easy and, unlike Susan Wild, I rely on the support and contributions of grassroots donors like yourself. While Rep. Wild may receive thousands in donations from outside the Lehigh Valley, my campaign is run off small dollar, local donations averaging less than $100. That is why I need you to chip in now so I can win in November and bring Conservative values back to our district. Values that work for every home and every family, not just the Elite and Special Interests. | | | == | Again, Fellow Patriot, thank you for taking the time to read this email. With supporters like yourself, we can, and we will win. | For Freedom, | | Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07 P.S - Have you seen Rep. Susan Wild's support for this bogus impeachment? We need to vote her out in November! == | | | == | == == | | | Dean Browning | 2432 W. Congress Street, Allentown, PA 18104 | | Sent by mailto:dean@browningforcongress.com in collaboration with |

name: Steve Chabot
subject: third time in history
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jduuurky-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

It’s official. For just the third time in our nation’s 243 year history, a president has been impeached.

Today, House Democrats made history for all the wrong reasons.

They ignored facts. They embraced lies. They put pure partisanship above the national interest. They had their mind made up long before they took the vote... No, they had their mind made up from the day President Trump was elected.

Friend, we need to stop the radical left.

That’s why I’m looking to you to make a statement!

We have the power to ensure that the history books don’t talk about President Trump’s impeachment without mentioning the backlash from Americans everywhere... we need to send a message that Americans are NOT WITH THE LEFT.

Will you chip in RIGHT NOW to show that you REJECT IMPEACHMENT? https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/ [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_20191212_20191218_impeachvote_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

This day will be remembered in American history. Do you want it to be remembered as the downfall of President Trump, or the beginning of a movement to stop the left and put results for American families ahead of partisan games?

The Democrats think they’ve won. They see today as a victory.

I’m counting on you to prove them wrong... will you chip in immediately? Let’s prove that Americans are AGAINST this sham impeachment of our president! https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/ [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_20191212_20191218_impeachvote_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

Steve Chabot

name: Mike Thompson
subject: lowering prescription drug costs
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter,

Last week, my colleagues and I passed the Elijah E. Cummings Lower Drug Costs Now Act in the House. This is a huge step towards reducing the costs of life-saving pharmaceuticals for millions of Americans, regardless of their insurance.

Despite campaign promises to lower the costs of prescription drugs, **President Trump is opposing this life-saving bill. This is disgraceful.**

[**Please add your name to support our bill to lower the costs of life-saving pharmaceuticals.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/t_Z6aN8qU1JM476PJI98Y-gaLmKPa8oiT4xP9taXRMc=/YHLwbteVRunQB5KHEhnNIO5w1Kb7VhfnfxQnBQooRjs=)

[**Sign on if you think President Trump and Senate Republicans should pass this bill to lower the costs of prescription drugs.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/t_Z6aN8qU1JM476PJI98Y-gaLmKPa8oiT4xP9taXRMc=/YHLwbteVRunQB5KHEhnNIO5w1Kb7VhfnfxQnBQooRjs=)

subject: Impeachment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13032486/134794155/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODg4M2NiNi05MDIyLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lvfPQqKd4q4WbmAjwrkF0MQ6fNWfHF-TcR0MTwq9mNk=&emci=37883cb6-9022-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=38883cb6-9022-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)

Peter, **Yesterday was a historic day. The House impeached a president for the third time in the history of our nation. **

But here in the Texas 10th, instead of standing up to the President’s abuse of power, Rep. McCaul abandoned all dignity and common sense. He said, “some 63 million Americans voted for President Trump,” and therefore he should not be impeached. Complete nonsense.

**McCaul has failed to uphold his oath of office.** He claims to be a foreign policy expert — then he must know how important foreign aid is. He knows that when Congress appropriates aid and the President withholds it to advance his personal agenda — that is an abuse of power. Michael McCaul swore an oath to defend our constitution but he has done nothing but protect his own political ambitions.

While McCaul has been sucking up to Trump, our district is in need. Tens of thousands without health care and closing rural hospitals. Several counties with polluted groundwater due to coal ash contamination and fracking fluids. Closing public schools and a growing homeless population. What has McCaul done with his time in office for the people of Texas 10? Nothing.

**I am committed to fighting for the people of this district. To ensure their needs are put first. And to fight to protect democracy in the United States, from all threats, foreign _and_ domestic. **
Fighting for you,
Mike Siegel

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: It’s our turn now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
I have one message for Nancy Pelosi: NOW IT'S OUR TURN. For the first time, President Trump will be able to fight back. And Pelosi's left-wing tactics will stop in the Senate - thanks to your Republican Majority.

Friend,

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Star Wars and our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
On the eve of the release of the final Star Wars movie, I’ve been thinking a lot about democracy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13033832/134807952/1070617568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTYzMzgwYi05NjIyLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yNZ-b2iBvl9UQRASOoXZ7Oq_bfxzDgtBUN1XKEN6b0=&emci=d0cfa7d3-8422-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=3e63380b-9622-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)
Team,

On the eve of the release of the final _Star Wars_ movie, I’ve been thinking a lot about democracy. A long time ago, in a galaxy far, far, away, Supreme Chancellor Palpatine was able to use lies and deceit to manipulate his colleagues in the Galactic Senate to dissolve their democracy in favor of an empire. In the new trilogy, the First Order was able to use brute force to topple the New Republic.

It is often said that democracy is not a spectator sport. Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia and the other heroes we’ve come to love understood this. Back home in the United States, the right to vote rests at the core of our democratic system. But voter suppression laws across the country have created barriers to voting that disproportionately impact people of color, low-income voters, students, and the elderly.

**When our most vulnerable communities are discouraged from voting, elected officials often feel like they can ignore their interests while in office.**

**[Will you sign my petition calling on Congress to strengthen our democracy and make it easier, not harder, for people to vote?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13033833/134807953/1070617568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTYzMzgwYi05NjIyLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yNZ-b2iBvl9UQRASOoXZ7Oq_bfxzDgtBUN1XKEN6b0=&emci=d0cfa7d3-8422-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=3e63380b-9622-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)** | [Make voting easier »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13033834/134807954/1070617568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTYzMzgwYi05NjIyLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yNZ-b2iBvl9UQRASOoXZ7Oq_bfxzDgtBUN1XKEN6b0=&emci=d0cfa7d3-8422-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=3e63380b-9622-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)
---
One of my favorite _Star Wars_ quotes is from Jedi Master Yoda: _“Do or do not. There is no try.”_ **When it comes to protecting our right to vote, there is only “do.”** It shouldn’t be a partisan issue, yet my opponent has consistently voted to weaken our democracy and make voting harder.

[**Sign my petition if you agree that everyone should be able to participate in our democracy. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13033835/134807955/1070617568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTYzMzgwYi05NjIyLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yNZ-b2iBvl9UQRASOoXZ7Oq_bfxzDgtBUN1XKEN6b0=&emci=d0cfa7d3-8422-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=3e63380b-9622-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249) [Sign now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13033836/134807956/1070617568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTYzMzgwYi05NjIyLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1yNZ-b2iBvl9UQRASOoXZ7Oq_bfxzDgtBUN1XKEN6b0=&emci=d0cfa7d3-8422-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=3e63380b-9622-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)
---

Thank you for standing with me on this issue (_and putting up with the Star Wars references!_).
\--_Eugene_

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
It's so important to me that this campaign really is powered by the people, and you're making that happen. Thank you.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191218-ty?refcode=em191218-ty&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") I can't thank you enough, team.

Because of you, we made up for our missed goal and find ourselves back on track for the final FEC quarter of the year.

Time and again, folks like you come through when we're in a real crunch. I feel so grateful for everyone on this incredible team. It's so important to me that this campaign really is powered by the people -- and you're making that happen.

But we cannot afford to take our foot off the gas quite yet, especially with the holidays just around the corner.

Our most important FEC deadline is less than two weeks away and the numbers we end up with will give us our resources for the start of 2020. Good or bad.

Our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat and flip the majority will be one of the most consequential tasks of our lifetimes.

All I ask is that every single one of us digs a little deeper in these final weeks to end the year strong.

Thank you for everything. Your generosity means the world to me.

-- Tina | [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191218-ty?refcode=em191218-ty&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=yes")

Our most important FEC deadline is less than two weeks away and the numbers we end up with will give us our resources for the start of 2020. Good or bad. Our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat and flip the majority will be one of the most consequential tasks of our lifetimes. All I ask is that every single one of us digs a little deeper in these final weeks to end the year strong. Thank you for everything. Your generosity means the world to me. -- Tina | ""

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: BREAKING NEWS: More NH Democrats Catch Impeachment Fever
body:

| Impeachment Fever!
---
NH Democrat Calls for Education Commissioner to Resign For Simply Doing His Job
---
| |
---
| Building off of the ridiculous political theater of yesterday's presidential impeachment vote in Washington, it looks like more NH Democrats are looking to get in on the fun. Yesterday, Executive Councilor and Gubernatorial candidate Andru Volinsky [called for the resignation](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzE0NDkzODc2Njg5NDQyMDE3JmM9czBkNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDM0NzE1NjImZD12NmEwYTZr.-5mo-iXTLXFFl31sYVHja8p4Ypl2ONIsftEWzhBcxAE) of Governor Sununu's handpicked Education Commissioner, Frank Edelblut. What was Commissioner Edelblut's high crime that is worthy of his dismissal? **He advocated for the acceptance of $46 million in a federal grant to support innovation in NH's Public Schools -**** _he was literally just doing his job!_** There is no denying it now, Democrats have pushed so far to the socialist-left that simply having a differing opinion on education funding is now cause for removal from office! They must be stopped! This is why we need a Republican Majority in the State House! [Please help us by making a $15, $25 or even $100 donation to the NH Senate Republicans by clicking here!](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzE0NDkzODc2Njg5NDQyMDE3JmM9czBkNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDM0NzE1NjQmZD1lNWk0ZDBw.gnDwtmX9J0Wym25e61ieiqiI_BVwqQqObsVJn0D_c-g)

name: Jason Yates
subject: 2 Free Chapters from Dr. Carson's "One Vote"
body:
| | Hi Peter, Our team is hard at work on our 2020 voter resources. To help us better develop our tools to best fit your needs, we’d love to ask you a couple of quick questions. [Take our quick two-question survey](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRh8hiUuPoSN_I-P-OsDnF3HkGOsv40cOo5u1E_9fX9p2UZaRryOLGy6aSYQy7ylgeBSD0ADrSruzRLogXdzn5fRSkdumUx8sfExi8XykDYw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191219srv01&n=1). When you answer, we will email you two free chapters from "One Vote: _Make Your Voice Heard"_ written by our Founding Honorary Chairman, Dr. Ben Carson. It’s a simple way of saying _thank you_ for taking the time to respond amidst this busy holiday season. Dr. Carson’s book is a must-read for every Christian in America, especially as we head into the critical elections of 2020. I know these chapters will be a blessing to you. We want to continue sending you tools and resources that will alert you with ways to be informed and get involved, but we want to respect your time and your email inbox! This survey will help us do just that. Please answer these two questions and tell us how you best identify as a voter and which topics are of value to you! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRh8hiUuPoSN_I-P-OsDnF3HkGOsv40cOo5u1E_9fX9p2UZaRryOLGy6aSYQy7ylgeBSD0ADrSruzRLogXdzn5fRSkdumUx8sfExi8XykDYw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191219srv01&n=2) Thank you, again, for your time and for being a part of our efforts to mobilize millions of Christians in America to get off the sidelines and vote. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191219srv01&n=3)
---

**
_That’s how many more donations we need to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.**If 1 out of 10 people reading this donate right now, we can finish the job.
** **
[We’re counting on you: please sacrifice anything you can today (even just $5) so we can raise 3,000 grassroots contributions by December 31st.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IQE/ni0YAA/t.2xo/ZrHex5iiTf-v9oS-vWxdKg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwEB9x-2FCyuVGhN-2Bygn2YOkatbMdrALzFx1F2TqRG4s-2F-2FwAwgkOZlSYugJ9FXc1xtpFiBZp8O1uE-2B5TVX3mgqj-2BmwLaEhBaVjZDT0W08eIpW-2F-2FXOU0ecySpUHPQzG3-2BXGWNob3-2F3kX1q4wROMwzmd5NvHyo9QQFIId4cPF-2BJoK9hdsW6K4aBqbo1-2BKm70yO4mBfojw-2FEPW5SU13uJk9HWBiHw-3D-3D/K9_V) ** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IQE/ni0YAA/t.2xo/ZrHex5iiTf-v9oS-vWxdKg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwEB9x-2FCyuVGhN-2Bygn2YOkatbMdrALzFx1F2TqRG4s-2F-2Fx6bjxs7yjLbPNTRhXBsIpUAp1NXTkaoSWlianpuNWus-2F3w4qQZCHfA4Cg3uGIbB7KJX4eNTkXnVAPYQajneDM0UutTaA1u4-2FuGE8-2F-2BZ-2F5-2FjUliP4soubZIC1PaUo8pDz0QbIZRRfL0mkUXaGN5SgZRUM0G5NpVnaKYMe-2FL0V5SNw-3D-3D/ZFB0) **__**

Hi Friend,
****
****
We’re faced with our biggest, most critical fundraising goal yet. Here’s why:
**If we raise 3,000 grassroots donations by our FEC Deadline on December 31st ↘**
* We’ll have the resources we need to spread Mondaire’s message & win this primary (expand our organizing efforts, host more meet & greets, print out more yard signs, etc.).
* We’ll be able to send a strong message that Democrats don’t need to take money from corporate PACs and special interests — grassroots-funded campaigns can be just as powerful.
* We’ll ultimately reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and prove our front-runner status in this race.

**But if we DON’T raise 3,000 grassroots donations by our FEC Deadline on December 31st ↘**
* **We’ll have to have to look at the budget and start slashing funds.** With the primary just around the corner, we can’t afford to shrink critical programs like organizing & digital. This could damage the momentum we worked so hard to build.
* The media & our opponents will **scrutinize our numbers and question our ability to run a competitive campaign.**
* **We will be at risk of being out-spent by our opponents** who don’t rely on small-dollar donors.

******Because we’re a grassroots-funded campaign, we’re relying on donations to e-mails like these to make sure we hit our goal.[Will you be one of the supporters we need to help out? (You can donate any amount!)](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IQE/ni0YAA/t.2xo/ZrHex5iiTf-v9oS-vWxdKg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwEB9x-2FCyuVGhN-2Bygn2YOkatbMdrALzFx1F2TqRG4s-2F-2FysO1Gss-2FRmHMhcxnDghM01qBnFszGzDK-2FjDA8E0dHPJh1UCyK65LAa0mq1PwcGTYWbPhXPEivSxuBL7KgGuTUa5m9uJxxCoa96-2F1Q-2BeIPgBt0NrjrPJjdzy79E79EW1OCEgoXS2UrBpQ7nZb32hGNZmqcJtgbwgW6ztRq2XFJ2oQ-3D-3D/r7cv)[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IQE/ni0YAA/t.2xo/ZrHex5iiTf-v9oS-vWxdKg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwEB9x-2FCyuVGhN-2Bygn2YOkatbMdrALzFx1F2TqRG4s-2F-2FxhFzmOY7omE9wuei8QNVjra1Cgum8PeymgbArhiNu0q9-2Fm9astPaaFDSZY668GJsnptNhLhX0F6iF3fE9OSXvHQGXoBnVB9nVQe-2FRWHHjhu2KOfpia-2FwnLHkrPyjUdUbvAZJQ22TVKxQ3YnZFVzLUVJchNnux0wH-2FyIiTz5hAebw-3D-3D/YOpN) **

clean_body: There are a lot of reasons why it’s so important we reach this goal, but here are the ones on top of our minds. | | | | 659 That’s how many more donations we need to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.If 1 out of 10 people reading this donate right now, we can finish the job. Hi Friend, ** We’re faced with our biggest, most critical fundraising goal yet. Here’s why: If we raise 3,000 grassroots donations by our FEC Deadline on December 31st ↘ We’ll have the resources we need to spread Mondaire’s message & win this primary (expand our organizing efforts, host more meet & greets, print out more yard signs, etc.). We’ll be able to send a strong message that Democrats don’t need to take money from corporate PACs and special interests — grassroots-funded campaigns can be just as powerful. We’ll ultimately reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and prove our front-runner status in this race. But if we DON’T raise 3,000 grassroots donations by our FEC Deadline on December 31st ↘ We’ll have to have to look at the budget and start slashing funds. With the primary just around the corner, we can’t afford to shrink critical programs like organizing & digital. This could damage the momentum we worked so hard to build. The media & our opponents will scrutinize our numbers and question our ability to run a competitive campaign. We will be at risk of being out-spent by our opponents who don’t rely on small-dollar donors. **Because we’re a grassroots-funded campaign, we’re relying on donations to e-mails like these to make sure we hit our goal. We appreciate the help, Team Mondaire Paid for by Mondaire Jones for Congress Mondaire Jones for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 To receive fewer emails, please click | | Sent via . name: Evelyn Yang
subject: Humbled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
My family is grateful for the movement you’ve built

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9) Yang Gang --

[Can you chip $10 or more so Andrew knows you’re with him before tonight’s debate? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20109?t=5&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9)

When I married Andrew, I never thought politics would be in our future. And even when he told me he was running for president, I have to admit I was very skeptical of his chances.

But the last year has changed so much for our family. And as I’ve begun to join Andrew on the road, it’s been incredible to see how this movement has taken hold across the country. Traveling through Iowa last week was so inspiring -- and I know we can really win this thing!

Tonight, Andrew is going to walk onto the 6th Democratic debate stage. He’ll be one of only seven candidates to have qualified for each and every DNC debate so far -- and he’s the only person of color.

I’ve never been more proud.

You don’t have to be married to Andrew to share that pride. The truth is, you built this movement -- it was all of you who were inspired by what we can accomplish if we think a little harder.

[As he walks out onto the debate stage to articulate his vision to the nation tonight, he needs your support more than ever. Can you make a donation before he steps on stage so that he knows you’re with him? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20109?t=6&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20109?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20109?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20109?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20109?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20109?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20109?t=12&amount=25&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9)
---
Our family is humbled to be a part of this with you,

Evelyn Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20109?t=13&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4928%2E377263%2EHiibV9) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: We are writing to ask if you would make a $3 contribution to our campaign today. Susan Collins just announced she is running for re-election yesterday and we are looking for a big response -- lots of individual donations. Link inside. - Team Sara
body:
If you've been waiting
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fec/4bef7a87/6a53dcb0/287fe895/31516263/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
If you have been waiting to make your first online contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign to defeat Susan Collins, today is the day.
Here's why:
Yesterday Susan Collins announced she is running for re-election.
And the big-money special interests she voted for in Washington have taken this opportunity to flood her campaign with cash.
We don't have that.
On this campaign, the overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from lots of people making small contributions. And today, we need a big showing as well. So we're asking:
**[Can Sara count on you to make your first online contribution to our campaign today? We would not ask if it were not so important.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fec/4bef7a87/6a53dcb0/287fe894/31516263/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTktMS1kIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191219-1-d")**
This is going to be a tough race. It'll be close throughout. But while Susan Collins has a lot of big money, we have something she doesn't -- and that is the people. So thank you for chipping in -- especially today. It means a lot.
All our best,
Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fec/4bef7a87/6a53dcb0/287fe894/31516263/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTktMS1kIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191219-1-d")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fec/4bef7a87/6a53dcb0/287fe86b/31516263/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fec/4bef7a87/6a53dcb0/287fe86a/31516263/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fec/4bef7a87/6a53dcb0/287fe869/31516263/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: New USA Today poll:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | "WASHINGTON - President Donald Trump, the first modern president to face impeachment during his first term in the White House, now leads his top Democratic rivals in his bid for a second, a new USA TODAY/Suffolk University Poll finds. "The national survey, taken as the House of Representatives planned an impeachment vote and the Senate a trial, showed Trump defeating former Vice President Joe Biden by 3 percentage points, Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders by 5 points, and Massachusetts Sen. Elizabeth Warren by 8 points. "In hypothetical head-to-head contests, Trump also led South Bend, Indiana, Mayor Pete Buttigieg by 10 points and former New York City Mayor Michael Bloomberg by 9." \-- _USA Today_ Given the rapid shift in support toward President Trump, we need to know if your feelings toward him have changed. **Will you vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf7c/6e9863e8/17575748/1db04df2/458641049/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v4IYDvQk") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf7c/6e9863e8/17575748/1db04df2/458641049/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v4IYDvQk") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf7c/6e9863e8/17575748/1db04df0/458641049/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191219a.ND&refcode2=Xt46Y9YPlSyGBp8nMzz3")
