name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: I'd never forgive myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Nancy Pelosi asked. Adam Schiff asked. Kirsten Gillibrand asked. James Carville asked. Paul Begala asked. Khizr Khan asked. Deb Haaland asked. Gabby Giffords asked. **That 's how important this is to me.** I'd never forgive myself if I allowed President Trump and Mitch McConnell to take this Senate seat from Democrats -- but they're making unprecedented moves to defeat me. Which is why activating your Democratic Membership is absolutely pivotal to holding this Senate seat -- and listen, I'm only 2,762 members short of tomorrow's goal. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191219_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
`**dpwillis67@gmail.com: **[**PENDING**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191219_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")` `[_**Suggested Support: $10 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191219_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")`
---

I'm not just asking for me.

I'm asking because I know Medicare, our kids' education, the social safety net and our very democracy -- they're all on the line if we let Republicans continue to control the Senate.

This is the most important election we'll ever face together. Will you rush $10 before tomorrow's Early Membership Deadline?

| ****[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191219_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")****
---

****[**Chip in $20 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191219_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,70,130,180")****
---

****[**Chip in $70 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191219_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=70&amounts=10,20,130,180")****
---

****[**Chip in $130 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191219_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=130&amounts=10,20,70,180")****
---

****[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191219_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")****
---

Thank you,

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b799/18e32a7f/50ad6045/7b22b5cb/3365156208/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b799/18e32a7f/50ad6045/7b22b5c8/3365156208/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b799/18e32a7f/50ad6045/7b22b5c9/3365156208/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b799/18e32a7f/50ad6045/7b22b5ce/3365156208/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b799/18e32a7f/50ad6045/7b22b5cf/3365156208/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b799/18e32a7f/50ad6045/7b22b5cc/3365156208/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Please, need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi, I don't know where else to turn. We know losing in New Hampshire would mean handing the GOP Senate control for another two years -- **and the GOP is all in to flip New Hampshire red.**
Donald Trump, Mike Pence and Mitch McConnell have all met with Corey Lewandowski to strategize his campaign -- and in the meantime, GOP outside groups have dumped hundreds of thousands of dollars into the state to attack me. We know they'll do everything they can to defeat me next year.
That's why this news is so amazing:**A generous group of donors just offered to match all gifts to help us defend New Hampshire 's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats!**
Missing our $50,000 goal could mean losing in New Hampshire -- and with Senate control on the line, that's not a risk we can afford to take. **So I 'm counting on you to donate now, before our match expires, to protect New Hampshire's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.**
[**Please click here to give $3 or more before this match expires tomorrow at midnight.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc369/2a380d31/22e2666a/f0fe25/1301830890/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEyMTlfbXdoNGNqcy1tYXRjaDFfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20191219_mwh4cjs-match1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you,
Jeanne
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc369/2a380d31/22e2666a/f0fe25/1301830890/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEyMTlfbXdoNGNqcy1tYXRjaDFfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20191219_mwh4cjs-match1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: U.S. Senate Campaign Support
body:
I need your help before 12/31

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ef4db8d8bbc7/us-senate-campaign-support?e=41f8e27552)

Dear Friend,

Good morning. I want to touch base with you today and ask for your help.

As a Pro- Growth, Pro-Jobs Republican candidate for U.S. Senate, I will work with a strong focus to ensure that government stays out of the way of our economy. I'm living proof that hard work, a solid education and a spirit to seek - or even make - opportunities are the fundamental keys to personal success.

Between establishment opposition on the Right and the socialists on the Left, I'm relying solely on your support to win this election. We are pushing hard for a strong end of the year finance report to show our strength and momentum to the media and our opposition.
DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=6a84f3fd1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_18_09_36&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-6a84f3fd1f-180644441)

For this reason, I am asking my friends and supporters to please consider making a contribution of $1000, $500, $250, $100 or $50 to the campaign. We would greatly appreciate your support before our December 31st deadline.

Please visit our website, LindstromforSenate.com (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=6a84f3fd1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_18_09_36&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-6a84f3fd1f-180644441) or click the button below to contribute online; or make checks payable and mail to "Dave Lindstrom for Senate", 13725 Metcalf Avenue, Suite 324, Overland Park, KS 66223.

Again, I appreciate your consideration of support. I look forward to hearing from you soon.
DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=6a84f3fd1f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_18_09_36&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-6a84f3fd1f-180644441)

Thank you for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!

Dave

---
Friend -

POLITICO is calling our race one of the biggest House battles in the country, but right now, our opponent Chip Roy is massively out-raising us with nearly TWICE as much cash in the bank.

We can't afford to fall further behind. Roy has one of the most anti-choice records in Congress, and GOP leaders and megadonors are lining his campaign coffers to keep him in the House and continue the attack on women's reproductive freedoms.
**That's why this news is so exciting:** **A generous group of donors just offered to MATCH ALL GIFTS, dollar for dollar, to help us reach our $20,000 goal and flip this seat blue.**
This is the first time we've ever had a match opportunity like this. And we don't know when, or if, we'll get this offer again. **The only way we'll have the resources to win in a race this big is if we take FULL advantage of this match before it expires.**

And with the future of our democracy at stake, Wendy is counting on you to donate and make double the impact on this campaign.
**[Will you make a contribution of $3 (becomes $6) right now to help Wendy Davis flip this seat from red to blue, expand our Democratic majority in the House and hold Trump accountable?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aae/704929dc/167833bf/3993e016/3871868107/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTktZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk19-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi's fake impeachment scam is the most shameful display of partisanship in our nation's history.

The Democratic Party sent a clear message to its members - **follow Nancy 's orders or face the consequences.**

Only ONE DEMOCRAT had the spine to stand up and make it known that he works for the American people, not Nancy Pelosi and her Hollywood mega-donors.

That man's name is Congressman Jeff Van Drew, and I'm PROUD to announce that he is officially the newest member of the Republican Party.

The Democratic Party has run so far left that it is leaving it's moderate members behind.

The party elites have already announced that Congressman Van Drew will be one of their top targets in 2020. I'm asking conservatives like YOU to help defend this man who put Country ahead of party and stood up to Nancy Pelosi and her SOCIALIST cronies.

name: Team Scholten
subject: Seriously, Steve?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

As the House voted on articles of impeachment yesterday, we hoped that everyone would treat this process with the seriousness it deserves.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Nancy Pelosi is Stalling on the Impeachment Trial Because She Knows Democrats Messed Up
body:
"The speaker of the House knows her party screwed up their ridiculous and desperate impeachment push, apparently not having thought..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d06607e61&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Nancy Pelosi is Stalling on the Impeachment Trial Because She Knows Democrats Messed Up**

“Nancy Pelosi isn't stupid. The speaker of the House knows her party screwed up their ridiculous and desperate impeachment push, apparently not having thought things fully through,” Eddie Scarry writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

“Immediately after her party voted, with a few Democratic defections, to impeach President Trump, she threatened to withhold sending both approved articles to the Senate for a trial.” Why did House Democrats go through a rushed impeachment process if the charges might not even be sent to the Senate?

“The answer is obvious. Public support for impeachment and removal cratered after the congressional hearings last month”—particularly among independents.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e0ee4cde22&e=3ee4985eea)

**Must-read** : [4 Reasons Trump’s Impeachment Is The Weakest In U.S. History](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d16083f2a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “House Democrats voted Wednesday evening to impeach Donald Trump but, media high-fives aside, what have they accomplished? They have failed to persuade the country; they have set a new, low standard for impeaching a President; [and] Mr. Trump will be acquitted in the Senate,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f16e453921&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Several Washington Post reporters were under fire late Wednesday night for celebrating ‘Impeachmas’ following the impeachment of President Trump . . . ‘Merry Impeachmas from the WaPo team!’ WaPo Congress reporter and CNN political analyst Rachael Bade remarked in the post,” Joseph Wulfsohn reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=83ebd6c851&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “There is a reason why impeachment is so rare: It is the process by which the Congress overturns the will of the people. Some 63 million Americans voted for Trump, and it is an intensely powerful action to disenfranchise them . . . Congressional Democrats are setting a dangerous precedent by which any future president may be impeached for political and policy disagreements,” Rep. Jody Hice (R-GA) writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c284087d8&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

clean_body: | "" | | There's one big problem on the horizon as we push into 2020: Republicans in the Senate (and the White House) want to paralyze America with inaction. "" Under Mitch McConnell's leadership, the U.S. Senate is rotting. While the House passes progressive legislation in areas of critical need, Republicans in the Senate shrug their shoulders and let these good potential laws wither on the vine. McConnell and his team have abandoned any pretense of trying to move America forward --they're only looking out for Donald Trump, their corporate allies, and the ultra-wealthy. It's time for a new era of leadership in the Senate, starting with electing progressive Democrats who will fight to reverse the damage caused by Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell. It's all at stake--health care, the climate crisis, support for working families, our very democracy. I'm running in 2020 to do just that, and your support is the heart of my campaign. "" "" Onward to victory in 2020. subject: are you ready to fight?

body:
This is a pivotal time in our country's history. The rich and powerful are rigging the rules to make themselves richer and more powerful. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bcdc/45c30650/111debcc6/66fbfb6e/3705558943/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

This is a pivotal time in our country's history.

The rich and powerful are rigging the rules to make themselves richer and more powerful. Donald Trump is systematically undermining our institutions and our democracy. Our planet is in peril, and we're running out of time to defeat the climate crisis.

There is a lot at stake, and people are scared. **But _now_ is the time to tackle these big issues and Elizabeth is ready to fight.**

We need this movement to be stronger and bigger than ever in 2020. Last quarter, 18,629 people from Pennsylvania donated to this campaign. But we still need to grow if we are going to take on the rich and powerful.

**[Elizabeth is committed to putting political and economic power in the hands of the people, but she can't do it alone. We're so close to having one million donors. Can you become a donor today by chipping in anything you can to help continue this movement?
](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bcdc/45c30650/111debcc6/66fbfb51/3705558943/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTc5Rl9FR1JfQlNDX1dfMjAxOTEyMTlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM79F_EGR_BSC_W_20191219_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Over the past year, Elizabeth has spent a lot of time talking with people from all across the country, from all kinds of backgrounds and all kinds of communities.

And it's clear: People don't want small tweaks that nibble around the edges. They want big, structural change.

It's not enough to just defeat Trump. We need to stop our economy and our government from only working for a thinner and thinner slice at the top, leaving everyone else in the dust.

**Elizabeth has a plan for an America that works for everyone, but it's a team effort, and it's going to take a grassroots movement to create big, structural change.**

**[To make big, structural change in 2020, it's crucial you help this grassroots movement be as strong as possible-- can you chip in for the first time before Elizabeth takes the stage in tonight's debate?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bcdc/45c30650/111debcc6/66fbfb51/3705558943/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTc5Rl9FR1JfQlNDX1dfMjAxOTEyMTlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM79F_EGR_BSC_W_20191219_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Warren

name: Team Stanton
subject: Will you join us for the parade?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
The Fiesta Bowl Parade is one of the great annual traditions we have here in Phoenix, and we are excited to host a parade watch party as our final fundraiser of 2019 for Greg's re-election campaign!

**We have a _prime spot_ lined up along the parade route at 2 West Marshall Avenue, and will have a family-friendly watch party complete with breakfast treats for all attendees.**

**[We are expecting really high turnout for this event so please RSVP early if you plan to attend>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/02LYRzcX8V_PynlHDQxJsDxovyUhSXFZTO7Q0lMkf5s=/wOWncxVtoO_XZgwlD2ZTHODPhWBZQ-EJM_XlM4wM4uI=)**

The filing deadline for our race is tomorrow and pretty soon, we'll know who Kathy's opponents are. [_**We set a goal to raise $50,000 before the deadline, and so far, we 've raised $34,519. Will you chip in a few dollars to help get us the rest of the way there?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3ca/3d199a51/2f2783d5/7364e796/3389923105/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIxOSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191219?refcode=kme191219_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426") It's an ambitious goal, but we have a huge opportunity to make a real difference in the Triad and we can't waste it. name: Rob Portman
subject: Confirming Conservative Judges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Portman for Senate Committee | [Privacy Policy](http://www
body:
Peter -- In the Senate, **we have now confirmed 175 new federal judges that President Trump nominated.** This is more federal judges than any administration in history has confirmed in the first three years of a presidency. This is an even more impressive record when you consider how Democrats have tried their hardest to block almost all of these judges. These judges we have confirmed are smart, conservative men and women who will**interpret the law as written and not try to legislate from the bench**. They are lifetime appointments, and their decisions will impact the lives of our kids and grandkids in positive ways! You probably followed the nominations and confirmations of **Justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh** to the U.S. Supreme Court. I was proud to support them and play a leadership role in getting them through the Senate. I even had the honor of introducing Brett Kavanaugh at his confirmation hearing and standing by him as he faced **shameful smears and lies from liberals and the media**. In addition to the Supreme Court, we have also confirmed 50 Circuit Court and 121 District Court judges, including several conservative judges right here in Ohio. I’m writing today because **I need your help** to **keep this positive momentum going**. If we Republicans lose our majority in the Senate, this all goes away. **[Can I count on you to contribute $10, $20, or $50 today to help?](https://www.robportman.com/donation_v2?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191218_judges&n=1)** All best, Rob Portman P.S. - If you'd like to help us keep the momentum going, **please[donate, $20, $50, or $100](https://www.robportman.com/donation_v2?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191218_judges&n=2) today**. [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sYYV_ledEgoYeQO-o30kdJeTLiOkPFE0-_P396RlgQw&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191218_judges&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tgt5i9qzFHm-zEGuH8vKJ58&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191218_judges&n=4)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191218_judges&n=5)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191218_judges&n=6).

You can also keep up with Rob Portman on [Twitter](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNFH-_6OxP5XDDu7-tGRxb-c&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191218_judges&n=7) or [Facebook](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sYYV_ledEgoYeQO-o30kdIFdWO15ZZgfTH4Suo9WAEj&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191218_judges&n=8).

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94a/3eb3e2fc/69c83b66/744effc2/441213163/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94a/3eb3e2fc/69c83b66/744effc1/441213163/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: 120 million voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | "Nearly 120 million eligible Americans did not participate in the November elections." \-- Center for American Progress on the 2018 election. In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23%, and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. That's why we need to know if your voting plans have changed: **As of today, do you plan to vote in 2020?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf7e/6e9863e8/1750f060/1db04c03/363931317/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-Q-2Hw5h") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf7e/6e9863e8/1750f060/1db04c03/363931317/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-Q-2Hw5h") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf7e/6e9863e8/1750f060/1db04c01/363931317/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191219b.ND&refcode2=yaYeX1EO07rj3ZneDGA2")

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Have you taken my priorities survey?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
I’m gearing up to run one of the highest-stakes races in the entire country, right here in Pennsylvania. It’s still early, but the national Democrats Peter, I’m gearing up to run one of the highest-stakes races in the entire country, right here in Pennsylvania. It’s still early, but the national Democrats have already painted a target on my back – the spotlight will shine brightly in our state.
**That’s why I’m turning to you – I need your help to shape my strategy. Looking ahead to 2020, I need to know where you stand on the issues:**
Abortion. Medicare-for-All. Open borders. Taxes.
I have developed a priorities survey to find out what the people of Pennsylvania believe, so I can best represent them. I need you, Peter, to let me know your thoughts on these very important issues facing our nation.

name: MJ Hegar for U.S. Senate
subject: Senator Cornyn is violating his oath.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn is putting politics over country, again.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906bb/7f51f7bc/4a0a04aa/4ef0c225/2810045589/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

MJ Hegar and Senator Cornyn both took oaths. But Senator Cornyn is violating his -- he's made it clear as impeachment proceedings move to the Senate that he will not judge the case on the facts. **_Just look at the email he sent his supporters below, blindly defending President Trump and pledging to "wrap up this sham impeachment with an acquittal" less than an hour after the House voted to impeach._** **[**DONATE TO HELP MJ BEAT SEN. CORNYN >> **](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906bb/7f51f7bc/4a0a04aa/4ef0c224/2810045589/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191219.2nd__669__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Instead of impartially listening to the facts, Sen. Cornyn will put his loyalty to his D.C. bosses ahead of his duty to defend the rule of law.

It's no surprise, though: time and again Sen. Cornyn has helped bury legislation on critical issues -- like universal background checks, lower prescription drug prices, and improved election security -- in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard.

We won't let him hide from his record of putting his D.C. bosses and the special interests over Texans. MJ Hegar knows what it means to uphold an oath, and she's not a political puppet who will put D.C. interests ahead of her constituents. **[Can you pitch in to help her build the campaign she needs to DEFEAT Senator Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906bb/7f51f7bc/4a0a04aa/4ef0c224/2810045589/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191219.2nd__669__&amount=10&recurring=true")** **[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906bb/7f51f7bc/4a0a04aa/4ef0c224/2810045589/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191219.2nd__669__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Thanks,
Team MJ Hegar \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **John Cornyn**
Date: Wed, Dec 18, 2019 at 8:06 PM
Subject: Impeachment FRAUD
> |
> ---
> Friend,
>
> It's official. Donald J. Trump is now the third president in U.S. history to be impeached. The Democrats have taken their charade to the nth degree, using our Constitution as a partisan weapon.
>
> This process began the day he was duly elected president, and culminates today in a one-sided vote void of any fact or truly impeachable offense.
>
> Today is a sad day in American history. Democrats should be ashamed of their actions.
>
> **But friend, the longer we sit in silence, the more credibility we give Pelosi, Schiff, and Nadler.**
>
> We need to ban together and make a loud statement in defiance of the Left's disgusting abuse of our Constitution, and we need to make it quickly.
>
> **Will you join me by IMMEDIATELY showing just how much you REJECT this sham impeachment of President Trump?**
>
> Democrats have had their minds made up from the outset. In their minds, President Trump was guilty of high crimes and misdemeanors before he even took office.
>
> In the Senate, I assure you our president will be treated differently. We'll give him a fair shake and wrap up this sham impeachment with an acquittal.
>
> **But before we do that, I 'm counting on you to embrace this chance to make a statement that will go down in history... I need you to make sure that today is remembered as the day Conservatives fought back against injustice... not the day President Trump's downfall began.
>
> Will you chip in to defend President Trump IMMEDIATELY?**
>
> \- Senator John Cornyn

|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Ortt Endorsed by Associated Builders and Contractors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
|
**ORTT ENDORSED BY ASSOCIATED BUILDERS AND CONTRACTORS** _A press release from Bronze Star recipient and New York State Senator Rob Ortt_ Niagara County, NY --- Today, New York State Senator Rob Ortt, U.S. Army combat veteran, and candidate for New York’s 27th Congressional District announced that he has received the endorsement of the Associated Builders and Contractors (ABC).

“I am honored to have the endorsement of the more than 20,000 hardworking men and women represented by the Associated Builders and Contractors,” said Ortt. “I am proud to have had the support of this organization in the past, and I have always believed that America is a nation of builders. During my time in the New York State Senate, I have worked diligently to support pro-business, worker-friendly policies that make construction projects safer and less costly, and I will continue to do so when serving the hardworking men and women of New York’s 27th Congressional District in Washington. The American economy is working when these men and women are working.”

ABC represents over 20,000 members of the national construction trade industry, helping individuals win work and deliver work safely, ethically, and profitably for the betterment of the communities in which they are located.

“The Empire Chapter supports fair and open competition, not politicians who favor rewarding campaign donors at the expense of every day New Yorkers,” said Brian Sampson, President of Associated Builders and Contractors, Empire State Chapter. “Rob Ortt not only understands the importance of free enterprise and job creation, but is a leader on the issue. He has seen first-hand the negative impact of tax burdens and poor regulatory policy decisions. ABC is proud to stand with Rob and share his vision to bring jobs and opportunity to hardworking families throughout our great nation.”
###
_After the terror attacks on September 11, 2001, Ortt enlisted in the U.S. Army and would serve as a First Lieutenant in Afghanistan during Operation Enduring Freedom. During his service, Ortt would be awarded the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghanistan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman’s Badge. Ortt was also deployed to the U.S. Southern border as part of the recently declassified 2006 Operation Jumpstart, which supported border security and construction of a border fence._

ABC is proud to stand with Rob and share his vision to bring jobs and opportunity to hardworking families throughout our great nation.” After the terror attacks on September 11, 2001, Ortt enlisted in the U.S. Army and would serve as a First Lieutenant in Afghanistan during Operation Enduring Freedom. During his service, Ortt would be awarded the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghanistan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman’s Badge. Ortt was also deployed to the U.S. Southern border as part of the recently declassified 2006 Operation Jumpstart, which supported border security and construction of a border fence. | "Donate Here" | Missed my campaign launch video? Click here to learn more about my campaign to bring conservative, battle-tested leadership to Washington. | | | | | | | | | | | | www.robortt.com | | mailto:info@robortt.com | | Rob Ortt for Congress PO Box 101 Lockport, NY 14094 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS

name: Charles Booker
subject: Mitch McConnell is THE issue in this election.

|

This is cut and dry, folks: The president of the United States has broken the law, the House has impeached him, and now it’s the Senate’s job to remove him from office. Kentucky deserves a senator who recognizes that and puts the people ahead of their own political interests. Mitch won’t do that, and that's why he has to go. _****_**[I’m leading a movement to defeat Mitch McConnell and put Kentuckians first. Charles Booker

As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, **[will you donate to his exploratory committee?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13042720/134905395/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191219_footer&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTVjZjc3Yy1jNjIyLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAgG8NfTjd2H7bJmW68ontw8vGTSAyuqC6wTFa2wpP4=)**

subject: Obamacare REPEALED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:

name: Cory Booker
subject: Donald Trump has been impeached.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Last night, the House of Representatives voted to impeach President Donald Trump. This vote was the culmination of a three-month House impeachment process that has uncovered alarming evidence that the president used his official power for personal gain, put our national security at risk, and obstructed the investigation into his misconduct. I may be a member of Donald Trump's opposing party, but it brings me no joy that an American president allegedly committed such serious wrongdoing that he is now potentially facing removal from office. **This is a sad moment for our country.** **[I'm running for president to restore our sense of common purpose and lead our country with integrity again. If you're ready for new leadership, please consider supporting my campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191219_CB_20191219-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As this process heads to the Senate for trial, I'll uphold my sacred oath to protect and defend the Constitution. This trial demands an impartial and thorough review of the evidence. We must be presented with relevant witnesses and documents, and follow the evidence where it leads. I'm ready to fulfill my role as a juror. And I'm ready to turn the page on this dark era of our history so we can begin the hard work of uniting the American people again and healing our deeply, deeply divided country. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191219_CB_20191219-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cee/5fca0d19/7866a20d/291cedc9/2761845608/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cee/5fca0d19/7866a20d/291cedc8/2761845608/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cee/5fca0d19/7866a20d/291cedd7/2761845608/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cee/5fca0d19/7866a20d/291cedd6/2761845608/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cee/5fca0d19/7866a20d/291cedd5/2761845608/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cee/5fca0d19/7866a20d/291cedc9/2761845608/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: A sad day for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
The impeachment farce is a new low | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/424b96c5914f/a-sad-day-for-america?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| |
# Partisan Impeachment does violence to the Constitution

I am profoundly saddened by the dangerous precedent set by the Democrats in the House of Representatives. By impeaching President Trump along a party line vote, Nancy Pelosi and her co-conspirators have crossed the Rubicon and there will be no turning back.

---
| [I stand with President Trump](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=5bf19b6c30&e=01c99b7fbd "I stand with President Trump")
---
| Just as Hamilton warned in Federalist 65, **partisan impeachment is dangerous and deeply corrosive to the foundations of representative democracy**. When America chose a republican form of government, we traded the sword for the ballot box, power for persuasion, force for consent.

Yesterday's action rolls back that consent and weakens our social contract, the glue that allows 350 million people to coexist peacefully despite our extraordinary diversity of cultures, traditions, faiths, and beliefs.

I shudder at the implications of this short-sighted and vile act of attempting to use administrative power to undo the will of the people as expressed through our democrat process.

Please stand with me as I stand with President Trump.

[Sign the petition](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=84afbe9309&e=01c99b7fbd)[ and make your voice heard.](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=25a887ac19&e=01c99b7fbd)

**Evil will prosper only when good people do nothing.**

Kathaleen
---
|
---

name: John Walsh, EdMarkey.com
subject: This is a grassroots campaign through and through.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We're investing in organizing and building an army of supporters on the ground in Massachusetts. | |
---
| Friends -

This is a grassroots campaign through and through.

We're investing in organizing to build an army of supporters on the ground in Massachusetts. We know that's going to be key to winning our race.

Person by person, we will build a movement of working people willing to fight for our progressive agenda, and together, we will do the hard work that it takes to win.

That's the plan, and we'll win if we can pull it off. So I'm asking:

**[Will you make a $3 donation today? We'll invest it immediately in growing our ground game. We want to build a grassroots team unlike anything Massachusetts has seen before.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfcd/693b8b0a/439c89dc/72de7e4f/3046413491/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191219-full")**

Our grassroots strategy doesn't stop with organizing. It's also how we're going to fund this campaign.

Ed's rejecting all corporate PAC money, and instead, we're counting on small-dollar donors to power our movement.

In fact, one of the most important ways we fund our campaign is through donations from supporters like you in response to emails like this one! We're hoping that you can be among those who step up to give today. What do you say?

**[Make a $3 contribution ahead of our major FEC deadline to help us fund this grassroots campaign. We need your help to keep Ed on the front line of the fight for our progressive agenda.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfcd/693b8b0a/439c89dc/72de7e4f/3046413491/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191219-full")**

The FEC deadline is going to be a big moment for us to show our grassroots strength, so thanks for making sure we're in as strong of a position as possible.

\- John Walsh
Campaign Manager **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfcd/693b8b0a/439c89dc/72de7e4f/3046413491/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191219-full")**

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year U.S. military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Dear Madam Speaker (Love, Donald J. Trump)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Dear Madam Speaker: I write to express my strongest and most powerful protest against the partisan impeachment crusade being pursued by the Democrats in the House of Representatives. This impeachment represents an unprecedented and unconstitutional abuse of power by Democrat Lawmakers, unequaled in nearly two and a half centuries of American legislative history. ...Your first claim, "Abuse of Power," is a completely disingenuous, meritless, and baseless invention of your imagination. You know that I had a totally innocent conversation with the President of Ukraine. I then had a second conversation that has been misquoted, mischaracterized, and fraudulently misrepresented. Fortunately, there was a transcript of the conversation taken, and you know from the transcript (which was immediately made available) that the paragraph in question was perfect. ....The second claim, so-called "Obstruction of Congress," is preposterous and dangerous. House Democrats are trying to impeach the duly elected President of the United States for asserting Constitutionally based privileges that have been asserted on a bipartisan basis by administrations of both political parties throughout our Nation's history. Under that standard, every American president would have been impeached many times over. ...Congressman Adam Schiff cheated and lied all the way up to the present day, even going so far as to fraudulently make up, out of thin air, my conversation with President Zelensky of Ukraine and read this fantasy language to Congress as though it were said by me. His shameless lies and deceptions, dating all the way back to the Russia Hoax, is one of the main reasons we are here today. ...You are the ones interfering in America's elections. You are the ones subverting America's Democracy. You are the ones Obstructing Justice. You are the ones bringing pain and suffering to our Republic for your own selfish personal, political, and partisan gain. ...More due process was afforded to those accused in the Salem Witch Trials. ...I have no doubt the American people will hold you and the Democrats fully responsible in the upcoming 2020 election. They will not soon forgive your perversion of justice and abuse of power. ...There is far too much that needs to be done to improve the lives of our citizens. It is time for you and the highly partisan Democrats in Congress to immediately cease this impeachment fantasy and get back to work for the American People. While I have no expectation that you will do so, I write this letter to you for the purpose of history and to put my thoughts on a permanent and indelible record. ...This is nothing more than an illegal, partisan attempted coup that will, based on recent sentiment, badly fail at the voting booth. You are not just after me, as President, you are after the entire Republican Party. But because of this colossal injustice, our party is more united than it has ever been before. History will judge you harshly as you proceed with this impeachment Charade. Your legacy will be that of turning the House of Representatives from a revered legislative body into a Star Chamber of partisan persecution. One hundred years from now, when people look back at this affair, I want them to understand it, and learn from it, so that it can never happen to another President again. Donald J. Trump **Should Trump resign from office immediately?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf60/6e9863e8/17521dfa/1db04c9e/245166006/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/J65YY6lV") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf60/6e9863e8/17521dfa/1db04c9e/245166006/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/J65YY6lV") Thank you, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf60/6e9863e8/17521dfa/1db04c9c/245166006/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191219c.ND&refcode2=FQ16ySMCdDglVGn3E5vA")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

clean_body: | | | Dear Madam Speaker: I write to express my strongest and most powerful protest against the partisan impeachment crusade being pursued by the Democrats in the House of Representatives. This impeachment represents an unprecedented and unconstitutional abuse of power by Democrat Lawmakers, unequaled in nearly two and a half centuries of American legislative history. ...Your first claim, "Abuse of Power," is a completely disingenuous, meritless, and baseless invention of your imagination. You know that I had a totally innocent conversation with the President of Ukraine. I then had a second conversation that has been misquoted, mischaracterized, and fraudulently misrepresented. Fortunately, there was a transcript of the conversation taken, and you know from the transcript (which was immediately made available) that the paragraph in question was perfect. ....The second claim, so-called "Obstruction of Congress," is preposterous and dangerous. House Democrats are trying to impeach the duly elected President of the United States for asserting Constitutionally based privileges that have been asserted on a bipartisan basis by administrations of both political parties throughout our Nation's history. Under that standard, every American president would have been impeached many times over. ...Congressman Adam Schiff cheated and lied all the way up to the present day, even going so far as to fraudulently make up, out of thin air, my conversation with President Zelensky of Ukraine and read this fantasy language to Congress as though it were said by me. His shameless lies and deceptions, dating all the way back to the Russia Hoax, is one of the main reasons we are here today. ...You are the ones interfering in America's elections. You are the ones subverting America's Democracy. You are the ones Obstructing Justice. You are the ones bringing pain and suffering to our Republic for your own selfish personal, political, and partisan gain. ...More due process was afforded to those accused in the Salem Witch Trials. ...I have no doubt the American people will hold you and the Democrats fully responsible in the upcoming 2020 election. They will not soon forgive your perversion of justice and abuse of power. ...There is far too much that needs to be done to improve the lives of our citizens. It is time for you and the highly partisan Democrats in Congress to immediately cease this impeachment fantasy and get back to work for the American People. While I have no expectation that you will do so, I write this letter to you for the purpose of history and to put my thoughts on a permanent and indelible record. ...This is nothing more than an illegal, partisan attempted coup that will, based on recent sentiment, badly fail at the voting booth. You are not just after me, as President, you are after the entire Republican Party. But because of this colossal injustice, our party is more united than it has ever been before. History will judge you harshly as you proceed with this impeachment Charade. Your legacy will be that of turning the House of Representatives from a revered legislative body into a Star Chamber of partisan persecution. One hundred years from now, when people look back at this affair, I want them to understand it, and learn from it, so that it can never happen to another President again. Donald J. Trump Should Trump resign from office immediately? "" "" Thank you, WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: John Hickenlooper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- Yesterday, I was appalled to see a federal appeals court strike down critical parts of the Affordable Care Act as part of the Republicans' continued attempts to dismantle Obamacare. This lawsuit was supported by the Washington Republican establishment, including by President Donald Trump and my opponent, Cory Gardner, who has voted at least 13 times to repeal, defund, or block the Affordable Care Act. **That represents a very real and critical contrast in this race.** While Trump and Gardner fight to take away people's health care, I believe health care is a right and will fight in the Senate to make that a reality. I will work to expand access to quality and affordable health care and will never vote to take away protections for pre-existing conditions. In Colorado, I brought people together to build one of the most innovative health care exchanges in the country. As a result nearly 95% of people in our state have health care coverage. And I'm ready to do it again when we defeat Cory Gardner and win this election next November. But I cannot do it alone. **If you can afford it, please make a contribution of $10 or more to our campaign today, and I promise you that I 'll always fight in the U.S. Senate to make health care a right:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191219-mm?refcode=em-191219-e&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks for stepping up and speaking out today.
-- John

name: Peters, Gary
subject: yesterday's MAGA rally
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Donald Trump is all in to defeat me.

---
| |
---
Friend,

Donald Trump is all in to defeat me. **That's why he was in Michigan yesterday where his campaign held a MAGA rally.**

Trump, McConnell and the GOP know a win in Michigan means Democrats will have ZERO chance at taking back the Senate. And that's why three GOP outside groups are already spending more against me than all other in-cycle Democratic senators combined. **Now, polling shows this race tied.**

But fortunately, we just got some incredible news: **A generous group of donors just offered to MATCH all donations up to our $20,000 goal! This offer expires at midnight: [Donate $3 (becomes $6) or more to protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk173-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Mitch McConnell has already confirmed two extreme right-wing justices to the Supreme Court and threatened to dismantle affordable health care. Honestly, it's never been more important for Democrats to win back the Senate majority.

**We can do it. Democrats _ can_ take back the Senate, but ONLY if we win here in Michigan. **And right now, in a race this close with the future of the Senate up for grabs, our fundraising is falling short. With just hours left until midnight, we still need to raise another $8,800 to win.

**I'm counting on you to take full advantage of this match opportunity - whatever you donate will go twice as far to defend Michigan's Democratic Senate seat.**

**Friend - I wouldn't ask if it weren't so important: [Will you rush $3 (becomes $6) right now and have your gift DOUBLED to win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk173-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Thank you,

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da910/5721a3ed/719c0082/efabb00/2511656442/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da910/5721a3ed/719c0082/efabb1f/2511656442/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da910/5721a3ed/719c0082/efabb1e/2511656442/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da910/5721a3ed/719c0082/efabb1d/2511656442/VEsA/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, **I have exciting news! Today we launched our new TV Ad in Iowa!** [Watch it Here >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94b/3eb3e2fc/69cd1a03/744ef91b/1011882836/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-100kstickerchallenge?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Watch+it+Here+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all") This is a milestone moment for the campaign. This AD will help us persuade voters in the early states and across the country to support our campaign. [To celebrate we are launching our 24-Hour $100K fundraising challenge where we will give anyone who gives $10 or more a free complimentary sticker!](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94b/3eb3e2fc/69cd1a03/744ef91a/1011882836/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-100kstickerchallenge?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+To+celebrate+we+are+launching+our+24Hour&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all") We've seen a lot of ads lately that push the most poll-tested messages. **This is a recipe for failure and it 's not leadership. ** Leadership means standing up for folks who get ignored and left behind. Leadership is bringing together different communities to find a new way forward that benefits everyone from the bottom up, not the top down. Leadership doesn't begin with a poll-tested campaign that asks where do you want to go so I can lead you there. [Watch our new ad here, and chip in right now so we can boost our ad buy >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94b/3eb3e2fc/69cd1a03/744ef919/1011882836/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-100kstickerchallenge?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+Watch+our+new+ad+here+and+chip+in+right+&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all") **We need you now more than ever. ** Your support means the world to us. Sincerely,
Team Julian
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94b/3eb3e2fc/69cd1a03/744ef918/1011882836/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all")

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94b/3eb3e2fc/69cd1a03/744ef907/1011882836/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all")

---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94b/3eb3e2fc/69cd1a03/744ef905/1011882836/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94b/3eb3e2fc/69cd1a03/744ef904/1011882836/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc94b/3eb3e2fc/69cd1a03/744ef903/1011882836/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191219_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Free sticker for you

name: Unite the Country
subject: Will you tweet during tonight's #DemDebate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter,
Tonight is the next presidential debate and we're ready to cheer Joe on! We know Joe is the candidate with the courage and integrity to unite the country and he has the best chance at defeating Donald Trump.
Our team here at Unite the Country will be live tweeting the best moments during tonight's #DemDebate -- and we need your help to ensure we reach as many people as possible.

[**Will you help us support Joe tonight? Follow us on Twitter at @UniteCountryPAC, retweet our clips & quotes from tonight's debate, and share your own thoughts about Joe's debate performance using #DemDebate.**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df768f/287b9173/2b05d9f5/7e76606c/990019590/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://twitter.com/unitecountrypac")

During the last debate, we shared some of Joe's top moments, and we're excited to do it again.

Tonight, we'll be talking about how Joe can unite the country after years of Donald Trump's spiteful and divisive rhetoric. We know that he can restore dignity and stability to the Oval Office and that he has achievable plans, backed by a track record of success.

In the Senate, Joe took on the NRA and won twice. He wrote the first Violence Against Women Act. And he was one of the first leaders to take action on climate change. As president, he'll always have the courage to fight for what's right.

[**Tune in tonight at 8pm ET and join us on Twitter as we live tweet the #DemDebate!**](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df768f/287b9173/2b05d9f5/7e76606c/990019590/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://twitter.com/unitecountrypac")

See you on Twitter tonight,

Unite the Country

[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df768f/287b9173/2b05d9f5/7e76606d/990019590/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://facebook.com/unitethecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df768f/287b9173/2b05d9f5/7e76606e/990019590/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/unitecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df768f/287b9173/2b05d9f5/7e76606f/990019590/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.instagram.com/unitethecountry/")
* * *
Paid for by Unite the Country, [www.unitethecountry.com](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df768f/287b9173/2b05d9f5/7e766068/990019590/VEsA/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.unitethecountry.com"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're counting on supporters like you, but if you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df768f/287b9173/2b05d9f5/7e766069/990019590/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://https://unitethecountry.cp.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Laura, Wendi (2)
subject: re: Friday planning meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
I wanted to make sure you saw this important email from Laura, Team.
We've got a huge planning meeting tomorrow, and we still need to hear from 85 people in FL to help us set our election strategy - so we've extended our survey deadline.
2020 will be like nothing we've ever seen before: Republicans will do anything to advance Trump's hateful agenda - and we're counting on grassroots Democrats like you to share your perspective and tell us what's happening on the ground.
**Please, will you share your critical input before midnight? We can win BIG in 2020 - but we can't do it without you.**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTY3NDQzOTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTM0NjM5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks so much for helping out when it matters most.

Wendi Wallace
DGA Deputy Executive Director
\----- Forwarded message -----
From: Laura, DGA
Date: Mon, Dec 16, 2019
Subject: Here's the honest truth about 2020
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
|
| | | Team -
---
Here's the hard truth: The 2020 election will be the biggest fight we've faced in years. Democrats have to stop President Trump and his GOP cronies - and we know Republicans will do anything to make sure we lose.
**Team, that means we need the best strategy to defeat them.**
As one of our top supporters, you know what it takes to win. We depend on your thoughts and opinions to help set our strategy because, even though politics is our job, we don't claim to know it all. The information our grassroots supporters provide gives us the ability to see the full picture.
**That 's why I'm reaching out today: [Please, if you can spare a few minutes, will you take our Election Year survey before midnight? Your responses will help us set our 2020 strategy and defeat Trump and his allies.](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY3NDQzOTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTM0NjM5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
Your input here is so critical: It's how we beat Donald Trump. It's how we organize, strategize and register every voter we can to defeat Republicans up and down the ballot.
Your response will help determine the outcome of the next election - and we're counting on you to help Democrats win across the country and stop Donald Trump's hateful agenda.
**But this survey is only open until December 16, 2019 at 11:59 P.M.** And right now, we're 259 short in FL of reaching statistical significance, so we're counting on your feedback to help elect Democrats and stop Trump.
_[**S**](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MTY3NDQzOTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTM0NjM5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)[o please, Team: Will you take our Election Year survey before midnight?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MTY3NDQzOTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTM0NjM5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)_
| | [HELP DEMOCRATS WIN ›››](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY3NDQzOTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTM0NjM5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks for making sure we have the best grassroots strategy to stop President Trump. With you on our team, we know 2020 will be a great year for Democrats and for this country.

Laura Carlson
DGA Digital Director
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16744394&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc4MTM0NjM5NAS2&spReportId=MTc4MTM0NjM5NAS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
---

name: Max Glass
subject: Kansas Senate race could be a TOSS-UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barbara Bollier for U

name: MJ Hegar
subject: A personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I want to tell you a little more about why I decided to run.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890683/7f51f7bc/4a0c0a8a/4ef0c3b9/3769786726/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

Running for Senate wasn't an obvious choice for me. I'm not a politician, I have two little kids, and look: most things that go on in Washington really make me mad. So I want to tell you a little more about why I decided to run **[(if you're already on board, you can make a donation here).](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890683/7f51f7bc/4a0c0a8a/4ef0c3b8/3769786726/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191219.1nd_a__649__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Senator Cornyn is an entrenched incumbent who's spent almost two decades in Washington serving the special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell. Now he has a nearly $11 million war chest funded in part by Big Pharma, the gun lobby, and the private prison industry.

**I don't expect him to put Texas first anytime soon. That's why I had to get into this race.[Will you pitch in now to help us build the campaign we need to win the upcoming Texas primary and take on Sen. Cornyn from the strongest position possible?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890683/7f51f7bc/4a0c0a8a/4ef0c3b8/3769786726/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191219.1nd_a__649__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

In the last few years alone, Sen. Cornyn voted to rip health care away from millions of Texans, voted against a bill that would've lowered prescription drug prices, and refused to support any meaningful action on gun violence -- including measures that the vast majority of Texans approve of -- even after horrific mass shootings in our own state.

I intend to do things differently. **I will fight for you tooth and nail every single day.** My votes will always be based on what's best for Texans, not who's writing the biggest campaign checks. As the only political outsider in the race and a working mom who has personally faced the struggles of everyday Texans, you can be sure of that.

**If you're ready for a senator who will put you first, I need you to pitch in so we can build the campaign we need to win.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890683/7f51f7bc/4a0c0a8a/4ef0c3bf/3769786726/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191219.1nd_a__649__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890683/7f51f7bc/4a0c0a8a/4ef0c3be/3769786726/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191219.1nd_a__649__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890683/7f51f7bc/4a0c0a8a/4ef0c3bd/3769786726/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191219.1nd_a__649__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890683/7f51f7bc/4a0c0a8a/4ef0c3bc/3769786726/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191219.1nd_a__649__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890683/7f51f7bc/4a0c0a8a/4ef0c3b3/3769786726/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191219.1nd_a__649__")**
Thanks for all that you do,

MJ Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890683/7f51f7bc/4a0c0a8a/4ef0c3b8/3769786726/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191219.1nd_a__649__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Andrew Yang for President
subject: Quick, let’s do this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4951%2E377263%2EkRZZJA) Yang Gang --

Andrew takes the stage for the final Democratic debate of 2019 in just a couple of hours.

We’re trying to get donors from every corner of the country to contribute TONIGHT to show Andrew there’s a big movement of people standing with him before the debate. **That means we still need a donation from 18326.

[Can you make a contribution and be the donor we need tonight in 18326 to show Andrew we’re all standing with him? Make a contribution here.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20136?t=5&akid=4951%2E377263%2EkRZZJA)** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20136?t=6&akid=4951%2E377263%2EkRZZJA)
---
This is how we show the strength and growth of this movement. This is how we send a message that we’re here to stay and win.

Let’s show everyone watching -- the media, the establishment, and voters across the nation -- what we’re made of.

Team Yang

name: Wendy Davis
subject: For the first time ever in our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
You can make twice the impact in flipping this Texas seat from red to blue.
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aac/704929dc/1607eb5d/3993e7c9/3239744655/VEsH/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://www.wendydavisforcongress.com/")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aac/704929dc/1607eb5d/3993e7c8/3239744655/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfc_email")
Friend,
I'm running for Congress for my grandkids. This is their future, and we have a responsibility to provide them with safe schools, a habitable planet and affordable health care. As one of the most competitive House races in the country, the road ahead will be long and tough - but I have incredibly exciting news to share.
For the very first time in our campaign, a committed group of donors just offered to _match every gift_ to help us reach our $20,000 goal. **Can I count on you to pitch in immediately and help me flip this Texas seat from red to blue?** **[Donate $3 right now- before this match expires - and your gift will be DOUBLED!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk20-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
As a young teenage mother, I learned a thing or two about making the most of what you've got - and stretching your means as far as they'll go. And I know that - if we want to flip this seat, expand our Democratic majority in the House and defend our reproductive rights - we can't afford to leave a single dollar on the table.
But this match is expiring at midnight tomorrow, and we're still $9,671 short of our goal. Friend, I don't know if we'll get another opportunity like this one - so I'm counting on you to come through right now.
**[Please, will you rush $3 or more right now to flip this seat from red to blue, defeat my anti-choice opponent and expand our Democratic majority in the House?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk20-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

Really appreciate it,
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aac/704929dc/1607eb5d/3993e7ca/3239744655/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aac/704929dc/1607eb5d/3993e7cd/3239744655/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aac/704929dc/1607eb5d/3993e7cc/3239744655/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
---
